title: goodenia strangfordii
intro: Goodenia strangfordii, also known as the Wiry Goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. The leaves and stems of the Goodenia strangfordii plant have been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against infection. Goodenia strangfordii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to aid in wound healing and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
